sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98415" key="summetriko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμμετρ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n98415.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of moderate size</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
